title: n8n Debug: Generate diagnostic report
body:
echo "=== n8n Diagnostic Report ==="
echo "Version: $(docker exec {{container-name}} n8n --version)"
echo "Environment:"
docker exec {{container-name}} env | grep N8N
echo "Health:"
curl -s {{n8n-url}}/healthz
echo "Container Stats:"
docker stats {{container-name}} --no-stream
description: Generate comprehensive diagnostic report - collect key troubleshooting info (mathias.rocks/blog/2025-01-19-5-common-n8n-errors)
